title: Smart Contract Security
subtitle: Audit-Ready Development
description: Learn smart contract security patterns — common vulnerabilities, auditing methodology, formal verification, and secure development lifecycle for EVM chains.

lessons.title: Reentrancy & Access Control
lessons.description: Understanding reentrancy attacks and proper access control patterns.
lessons.topics: Reentrancy, CEI pattern, Access control, Ownable patterns

lessons.title: Oracle Manipulation
lessons.description: How oracles get manipulated and how to protect against price oracle attacks.
lessons.topics: TWAP oracles, Chainlink, Flash loan attacks, Manipulation resistance

lessons.title: Integer Overflows & Math
lessons.description: Safe math, precision loss, rounding errors, and Solidity 0.8+ protections.
lessons.topics: Overflow/underflow, Precision loss, Rounding errors, Fixed point math

lessons.title: Auditing Methodology
lessons.description: How professional auditors review contracts — tools, checklists, and reporting.
lessons.topics: Audit scope, Static analysis, Fuzzing, Reporting standards

lessons.title: Formal Verification
lessons.description: Using mathematical proofs to verify contract correctness.
lessons.topics: Formal methods, Invariants, Symbolic execution, Certora / Scribble

lessons.title: Secure Development Lifecycle
lessons.description: Building security into the entire development pipeline from spec to deployment.
lessons.topics: Threat modeling, Code reviews, Test coverage, Bug bounties
